query: Find 10 parcels in Drammen municipality larger than 5000 m² that intersect 200-year flood zones, sorted by distance to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending.

1.description: get Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get parcels larger than 5000 m² in Drammen municipality using kommunenummer filter

3.description: get 200-year flood zones intersecting Drammen municipality

5.description: get quick-clay hazard zones intersecting Drammen municipality

6.description: transform parcel geometries to metric CRS for distance calculation

7.description: transform quick-clay hazard zones to metric CRS for distance calculation

8.description: compute distance from each parcel to nearest quick-clay hazard zone

9.description: sort parcels by distance to nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending
